Workshop 01

The Art of
Crochet

An ancient craft, rediscovered. A single hook and thread transforms into bags, flowers, plushies — and something deeply personal. Calms the mind. Ignites the creative soul.

₹500

All inclusive · No experience needed

  • Complete crochet kit provided
  • Special return gifts for lucky attendees
  • 10% discount on all Lifafa cafe food
  • Beginners absolutely welcome
✏️

Workshop 02

Portrait
Sketching

Think portraits are hard? Think again. We'll show you how simple and joyful it is to draw the faces you love. Sketch your favourite person. Gift it. Make them smile forever.

₹400

All tools included · Zero experience required

  • All sketching tools provided
  • 1 lucky winner gets a portrait drawn by us!
  • 10% discount on all Lifafa cafe food
  • Completely beginner friendly
